mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy a Snort inline IPS on the LAN side (place between the FortiGate firewall and the internal switch) so the pre-configured IPS can detect and block ICMP flood patterns and other malicious traffic automatically.

Enforce strict egress filtering and protocol whitelisting on the FortiGate firewall (allow only required outbound protocols such as HTTP(S)/DNS), and enable adaptive/rate-based DoS protections and per-host session limits to throttle or drop excessive ICMP/raw-packet flows originating from internal hosts.

args.command:
config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
set protocol ICMP
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "deny_icmp_outbound"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "allow_outbound_web_dns"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end

config system interface
edit "port2"
set allowaccess ping
next
end
config system session-ttl
set default 3600
end
config system dos-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port1"
set srcip {192.168.1.3}
set action block
set block-period 60
set udp enable
set icmp enable
next
end

mitigations.mitigation_name: Apply per-host ICMP and raw-packet rate-limiting / traffic policing at the LAN access layer (switch access ports or the firewall LAN interface) to cap packets-per-second and bytes-per-second per IP/MAC so the compromised host cannot generate flood volumes that saturate the network.

args.command:
iptables -N ICMP_OUT_LIMIT 2>/dev/null || true
iptables -F ICMP_OUT_LIMIT 2>/dev/null || true
iptables -A ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -m limit --limit 20/second --limit-burst 50 -j RETURN
iptables -A ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -j DROP
iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -m comment --comment "Limit outbound ICMP" -j ICMP_OUT_LIMIT
iptables -L ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -v -n
